task.title: Advance a Milestone to Done
task.shortdesc: Mark a milestone as done when the outcome it describes has been achieved.

context.p: Milestones do not advance automatically. You mark them done when you decide the outcome is complete. This is a deliberate checkpoint—before marking a milestone done, confirm that the outcome truly meets the standard you defined when you created it.

step.cmd: Select the project from the dropdown.
Select the milestone in the list.
Change the Status field to Done.
step.stepresult: Portfolio Manager records the completion date automatically.
The milestone's status updates in the list. The project's milestone score component increases, which may change the project's overall health score and traffic-light status on the Dashboard.

postreq.p: After marking a milestone done, check whether any new milestones should be promoted from Backlog to Planned to maintain forward momentum.
